summary: Public codex-cli-host smoke run options now accept telemetryStore.
runCodexCliReadOnlySmoke and runCodexCliWorkspaceWriteSmoke forward telemetryStore into the guarded runner.
Repeated modeled read-only smoke runs can now surface model probe cache miss and hit events through the normal observability sink.
remainingRisk: The live desktop host path still does not directly execute codex-cli-host smoke wrappers unless a caller opts into them.
next: Run a live read-only smoke twice with telemetry enabled and inspect the sink for one miss followed by one hit.
If needed, add the same explicit acceptance check for workspace-write smoke after user approval.
